creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #1)

It is hard to figure out the exact revision of the jail, the host has 

FreeBSD 12.0-CURRENT #1 r309142: Fri Nov 25 14:47:14 CET 2016

and before CUURENT has been broken due to a bug in IPSEC/mutex.h. I did an update of the jail - in case of any doubt, the jail has the very same revision.

For the record: I also did a "make delete-old-XXX" on the host.

The previous version of net/asterisk13 worked - but I'm not 100% sure whether I updated the host/jail AND did then the ports update on poudriere, too. But I'm 90% sure it did, since I ran two times poudriere that day with the update.

The jail tells me this:

Jail name:         head-amd64
Jail version:      12.0-CURRENT
Jail arch:         amd64
Jail method:       src=/usr/src
Jail mount:        /pool/poudriere/jails/head-amd64
Jail fs:           FS00/poudriere/jails/head-amd64
Jail updated:      2016-11-25 15:21:57
